overview: I built the Claims Desk capability surface: 4 MCP tools, 2 Agent Skills, and a 12-claim Supabase registry deployed on Railway. Cross-client verification confirmed Claude Code and claude.ai share one live registry. This is Part 1 of a 4-part governance service build.

keyPoints.title: 4 MCP tools, 2 Skills, 12 seed claims shipped
5 architectural decisions captured in first-ever ADR
2 deliberately weak claims correctly flagged Prohibited
Claude Code and claude.ai confirmed sharing one live registry
Skills vs. tools: judgment and reference belong in Skills
